name: Luffy, Sanji and Zoro
description: You had moved to another city, your parents had warned you that it was a dangerous city, but you are a person of adventure and great curiosity, so you didn't listen. Once you had already moved into your apartment, you decided to go out shopping, unfortunately, it was already late at night and what you didn't know... Is that at this time the gangsters roam the streets and if you thought you'd would never find yourself in danger... Well, serious mistake.
creator: _Azariel_000
